CreateCsnBp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateCsnBp.name: Name of the bandwidth package, cannot be empty
CreateCsnBp.interworkType: Interworking type of the bandwidth package. Valid values: [ center | center-edge | edge-edge ], representing cloud-to-cloud, cloud-to-edge, and edge-to-edge interworking respectively. Default is cloud-to-cloud
CreateCsnBp.bandwidth: Bandwidth value of the bandwidth package, maximum value is 10000
CreateCsnBp.geographicA: Region of the network instance. Valid values: [ China | Asia-Pacific ], representing Chinese Mainland and Asia-Pacific region respectively
CreateCsnBp.geographicB: Region of the other network instance. Valid values: [ China | Asia-Pacific ], representing Chinese Mainland and Asia-Pacific region respectively
CreateCsnBp.billing.billingMethod: Required for postpaid. ByTraffic: pay-by-traffic; ByBandwidth: pay-by-bandwidth; PeakBandwidth_Percent_95: 95th percentile billing; Enhanced_Percent_95: enhanced 95th percentile billing
CreateCsnBp.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for postpaid; mandatory for prepaid
CreateCsnBp.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateCsnBp.tags.tagKey: Tag key, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1–65
CreateCsnBp.tags.tagValue: Tag value, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0–65
